'''√t-k-s''' ('''katakas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:languish|languish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:languish|languish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √t-k-s
|-
! Lemma
| katakas
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thitakas || jitakas || shitakas || kitakas
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthutakas || jujutakas || shushutakas || kukutakas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thutakas || jutakas || shutakas || kutakas
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thutakas || jutakas || shutakas || kutakas
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thetakas || jetakas || shetakas || ketakas
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothotakas || jojotakas || shoshotakas || kokotakas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thotakas || jotakas || shotakas || kotakas
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thotakas || jotakas || shotakas || kotakas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || takas || takas || takas || takas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || takas || takas || takas || takas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || takas || takas || takas || takas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || takas || takas || takas || takas
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thætakas || jætakas || shætakas || kætakas
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathatakas || jajatakas || shashatakas || kakatakas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thatakas || jatakas || shatakas || katakas
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thatakas || jatakas || shatakas || katakas
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shatakas
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshatakas
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishatakas
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shatakasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshatakasnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishatakasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shatakasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshatakasnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishatakasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shatakasro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshatakasnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishatakasro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shatakasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshatakasnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishatakasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shatakassher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshatakasnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishatakassher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shatakasng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshatakasnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishatakasng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shatakasya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshatakasnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishatakasya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shatakasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshatakasnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishatakasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shatakasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshatakasnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishatakasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shatakasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshatakasnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishatakasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shatakasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshatakasnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishatakasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shatakasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshatakasnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishatakasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shatakasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshatakasnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishatakasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shatakasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshatakasnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishatakasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shatakasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshatakasnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishatakasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shatakasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshatakasnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishatakasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shatakasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshatakasnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishatakasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shatakasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshatakasnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishatakasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shatakasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshatakasnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishatakasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shatakasmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshatakasnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishatakasmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
